intercom.lastImportSummary: Imported 1 read-only Intercom conversations from US workspace history.

cards.body: Best for flexible webcam, light, and accessory positioning. Uses a 1/4 inch mount and is built for quick angle changes without redoing the whole setup.
cards.title: Magic Arm Kit

cards.body: Cleaner footprint for compact desks and overhead shots. Easier choice when the customer wants a simple, fixed mounting path instead of a fully articulated arm.
cards.title: Single Rod Mount

cards.body: Standard clamp fits most desks up to roughly 55 mm thickness. For thicker edges or lips, support should confirm desk profile before promising compatibility.
cards.title: Desk Clamp Fit Guide

cards.body: In-stock orders usually dispatch in 1 to 2 business days. Agents should avoid promising exact delivery dates when the courier handoff has not happened yet.
cards.title: Shipping and Dispatch

cards.body: Bundle positioning: camera stability first, cable cleanliness second, modular add-ons later. Strong angle for creators upgrading from improvised desk rigs.
cards.title: Creator Starter Bundle
